title: MasterChef Knife Set with Block, 5 Kitchen Knives with Sharp Stainless Steel Blades (Chef, Paring, Utility, Carving, Bread) Soft Touch Easy Grip Handles & Universal Knife Holder, Earth Greys
features: OFFICIAL MASTERCHEF PRODUCT - This professional quality 5 piece knife set with storage block is an official product of MasterChef the TV Series, designed in Great Britain.

6 PIECE SET - Set of five sharp stainless steel kitchen knives with universal holder to perform everyday prepping, slicing and chopping tasks like a professional. Set comprises 1x Paring Knife, 1x Utility Knife, 1 x Bread Knife, 1 x Carving Knife , 1 x Chef Knife, 1 x Block
HAND SHARPENED BLADES - The high quality, stainless steel blades are hand sharpened for long lasting razor sharpness to perform everyday kitchen tasks effortlessly.

NON-STICK COATED BLADES - The razor sharp stainless steel blades are coated with a non-stick, antibacterial plating for convenience and increased corrosion resistance while giving them a stylish matte finish.
SOFT TOUCH HANDLES - Ergonomically designed handles for a balanced and comfortable grip. The soft-touch handles gives a contemporary look in combination with the matte coated knife blades.
description: From the manufacturer The MasterChef knives are coated in a protective non-stick covering to prevent scratching and damage during storage/transit. Fitted with hand sharpened, stainless steel blades, our knives are designed to glide through a number of tough foods with ease. From swedes to croissants, these high quality blades are perfect for tackling foods with both precision and speed. This MasterChef official, hand-sharpened, stainless steel kitchen knife set contains a knife for every eventuality. Whether it be for salad, bread or herb cuttings, this sleek knife collection has you covered for any meal or occasion. Comprised of 5 expertly constructed pieces, each knife is embossed with the official MasterChef logo on the body of the blade. These soft, matte handles provide a firm and comfortable grip when undergoing expansive prep or precise carving jobs. Designed with comfort in mind, these timeless, chic knives perfectly complement both minimalist homes and more eclectic spaces.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎1 x chef's knife, 1 x bread knife, 1 x utility knife, 1 x kitchen knife and 1 x carving knife
